creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
[DESCRIBE CHANGES]
- Added STAGE support
- Added LICENSE
- Merged sysutils/mbmon and this into a single port with the help of OPTIONSNG
- Merged PR ports/184521 so it should be closed
- sysutils/mbmon should be marked depreciated and deleted as this has been merged

For Committer's reference:
http://pdr.s.ubze.ro/bulk/latest-per-pkg/xmbmon/205_10/84i386-default.log
